title: Foggy Clouds
description:
Brings back the soft, misty look for faraway clouds  just like older Minecraft versions before 1.21.6.
Perfect for players who miss the classic atmospheric feel of distant skies.
body:
Brings back the soft, misty look for faraway clouds — just like older Minecraft versions before **1.21.6**. This small visual tweak makes the sky feel deeper, smoother, and more realistic, especially during rain or sunrise.

Perfect for players who miss the classic atmospheric vibe of Minecraft’s older clouds.
